allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('docs count:', len\(d.get\('docs',[]\)\), '\\nmetadata:', json.dumps\(d.get\('metadata',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status: ok, docs:', len\(d.get\('docs',[]\)\), '\\nselected_filters:', json.dumps\(d.get\('metadata',{}\).get\('selected_filters',[]\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('sort_order test - sort used:', d.get\('metadata',{}\).get\('sort','?'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('sort test - sort used:', d.get\('metadata',{}\).get\('sort','?'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('price test - status:', 'ok' if 'docs' in d else d\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('VEHICLES:', len\(d.get\('docs',[]\)\), 'docs, filters:', [f['display_name'] for f in d.get\('metadata',{}\).get\('selected_filters',[]\)]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cats = d.get\('filters',[]\); [print\(f['name'], ':', [v.get\('label',''\) for v in f.get\('values',[]\)[:5]]\) for f in cats if f.get\('name'\) in \('category','location','st'\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d.get\('metadata',{}\); print\('num_results:', m.get\('num_results'\), 'selected:', [f['display_name'] for f in m.get\('selected_filters',[]\)]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('trade_type=s:', 'ok' if 'docs' in d else d.get\('detail','err'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('st=s:', 'ok, docs:', len\(d.get\('docs',[]\)\) if 'docs' in d else d.get\('detail','err'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d.get\('metadata',{}\); print\('category=0.69 \(Sport\):', m.get\('num_results'\), 'results, selected:', [f['display_name'] for f in m.get\('selected_filters',[]\)]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d.get\('metadata',{}\); print\('locations Stockholm:', m.get\('num_results'\), 'results, selected:', [f['display_name'] for f in m.get\('selected_filters',[]\)]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d.get\('metadata',{}\); print\('sort_order=PUBLISHED_DESC, sort used:', m.get\('sort','?'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('utan filter docs:', len\(d.get\('docs',[]\)\), 'result_size:', d.get\('metadata',{}\).get\('result_size',{}\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(f['name']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
